overall.description: A ship simulation game depicting the view from a vessel's bridge as it travels through stormy seas at night. The scene features functional navigation monitors displaying radar and nautical charts, with a lightning strike illuminating the ocean toward the end of the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with forward navigation view over the bow

events.description: bright lightning strike illuminates the ocean on the port side, creating a brief flash of white light

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel from the bridge, monitoring navigation systems while moving forward through rough seas

entered.detail: navigation display showing nautical chart with colored depth contours and land masses
circular radar display with rotating sweep arm showing surrounding targets
blue-tinted sonar or depth finder display showing underwater terrain
metal structural frame surrounding the forward viewing window of the bridge
red-brown metal deck of the ship's bow with safety railings visible through the window
dark gray stormy sea surface with visible wave movement
metal safety railing along the port side of the bow deck
metal safety railing along the starboard side of the bow deck

segments.scene_description: The view from inside a ship's bridge looking forward over the bow as the vessel moves steadily through dark stormy waters at night. Three navigation monitors glow with chart and radar displays while the ship cuts through choppy waves. Toward the end of the segment, a bright lightning strike flashes on the port side, briefly illuminating the ocean surface before returning to darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady forward progression from the interior of a ship's bridge into a sudden, violent flash of light across a dark ocean. It begins with a view over the bow as the vessel cuts through choppy, stormy waters under a heavy night sky. As the ship moves forward, the dim interior is punctuated by the steady glow of three navigation monitors displaying radar and nautical charts. The scene then shifts abruptly when a bright lightning strike flashes on the port side, momentarily illuminating the churning surface of the sea before the environment plunges back into darkness.
